title: Alex's Caves: Adventure
description: Adds new items for Alex's Caves🧲
body:
![Alex's Caves: Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cc07f10dd0812aee23d6d40d5668d01d0218faf.png)

This is an Addon for Alex's Caves that adds several new items, all with unique functions and uses!

![Galena Controller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/790ca90f0fec449081f27844f488cc8c925b655e.png)

Galena Controller is a very rare item that allows you to perform a magnetic leap, which significantly speeds up your mobility.

![Ferrouslime Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa36700e204430150086f0ab9dfd461590198b48.png)

Ferrouslime Block is distinguished from a regular slime block by its repulsiveness, which is activated when the player jump on the block, but be careful because it does not absorb fall damage.

![Uranium Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2f6283ef8e72dc7e6236281f596f2775cd410b0.png)

A sword made of radioactive uranium, inflicting non-healing wounds and poisoning the opponent.

![Music Disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b76b640bd76101d972b8a16d3a062bba2a4a62e1.png)

New music, probably made by a person who once lived in the area now called Toxic Caves.

![Occult Triangle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae2e07ca3f36fb2ced5f0ae8d5c0f54c7428a2cc.png)

An item used to create a levitation potion.
